title: Enable/Disable Toggle Switches
test_steps: Navigate to the Weather Notifications screen. | Click on each toggle switch to enable and disable the weather alerts. | Verify that the toggle switches reflect the correct state.
expected_result: Each toggle switch should toggle between enabled and disabled states.

title: Enable/Disable Temperature Display
test_steps: Navigate to the Weather Notifications screen. | Click on the toggle switch for displaying the current temperature. | Verify that the toggle switch reflects the correct state.
expected_result: The toggle switch should toggle between enabled and disabled states.

title: Enable/Disable Lock Screen Weather Banner
test_steps: Navigate to the Weather Notifications screen. | Click on the toggle switch for displaying the weather on the lock screen. | Verify that the toggle switch reflects the correct state.
expected_result: The toggle switch should toggle between enabled and disabled states.

title: Enable/Disable Show Alerts in Status Bar
test_steps: Navigate to the Weather Notifications screen. | Click on the toggle switch for showing alerts in the status bar. | Verify that the toggle switch reflects the correct state.
expected_result: The toggle switch should toggle between enabled and disabled states.

title: Enable/Disable Sounds/Lights/Vibration
test_steps: Navigate to the Weather Notifications screen. | Click on each checkbox for enabling sounds, lights, and vibration. | Verify that the checkboxes reflect the correct state.
expected_result: Each checkbox should toggle between enabled and disabled states.

title: Click on Done Button
test_steps: Navigate to the Weather Notifications screen. | Click on the 'Done' button at the bottom. | Verify that the screen returns to the previous screen.
expected_result: The screen should return to the previous screen.

title: Toggle Switches State
test_steps: Navigate to the Weather Notifications screen. | Click on each toggle switch to enable and disable the weather alerts. | Click on the 'Done' button at the bottom. | Verify that the toggle switches reflect the correct state.
expected_result: Each toggle switch should toggle between enabled and disabled states.

title: Checkboxes State
test_steps: Navigate to the Weather Notifications screen. | Click on each checkbox for enabling sounds, lights, and vibration. | Click on the 'Done' button at the bottom. | Verify that the checkboxes reflect the correct state.
expected_result: Each checkbox should toggle between enabled and disabled states.
